# Storage Entitlements Module

Module ID: storage-entitlements
Status: draft
Purpose: Atomic storage quota reservation, storage packages, one-time purchase completion, expiring share links, and download counting.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm --filter @microservices-sh/storage-entitlements check:spec
Build: pnpm --filter @microservices-sh/storage-entitlements build
Test: pnpm --filter @microservices-sh/storage-entitlements test
